topic: Determination of Forward and Futures Prices
title: Valuing Forward Contracts: Calculate the present value of a future cash flow of...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: Calculate the present value of a future cash flow of $1000 to be received in 2 years at a discount rate of 10%.
solution: The present value is calculated using PV = FV / (1 + r)^n. Here, PV = 1000 / (1 + 0.10)^2 = $826.45. [[24]]
